next_steps: Open http://<ct-ip>:3010 from the LAN and create the first admin account in the web UI.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/affine-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Keep HDC_AFFINE_DB_PASSWORD backed up — changing it after Postgres init breaks the database volume.
For public HTTPS later, set affine.public_url and add BIND + nginx-waf upstream with WebSockets enabled.
